trending_videos.title: "Spider-Noir" - Authentic Black & White Trailer | Prime Video
trending_videos.description:
Next month, the web starts to unravel. Watch the new trailer for “Spider-Noir” – a live-action series starring Nicolas Cage – arriving in both Authentic Black & White and True-Hue Full Color May 27 on Prime.

trending_videos.title: Star Trek: Strange New Worlds | Season 4 Official Teaser | Paramount+ (CCXP Mexico 2026)
trending_videos.description:
Star Trek: Strange New Worlds season 4 premieres July 23 only on Paramount+. 

The crew of the U.S.S. Enterprise, led by Captain Christopher Pike, embarks on a series of thrilling and emotional adventures across the stars. On their journey, they will battle inner demons and external threats, encounter colorful new characters, reunite with familiar faces and confront terrifying aliens. Through it all, they strive to embrace a bright, hopeful future.

Like Paramount+ on Facebook: https://bit.ly/PPlusFacebook    
Follow Paramount+ on X: https://bit.ly/PPlusOnX     
Follow Paramount+ on Instagram: https://bit.ly/PPlusInstagram 
Follow Paramount+ on Threads: https://bit.ly/PPlusThreads 
Follow Paramount+ on TikTok: https://bit.ly/PPlusTikTok     

With Paramount+ you can stream over 40,000 episodes and movies from CBS, BET, Comedy Central, MTV, Nickelodeon, Smithsonian Channel, Paramount Pictures, and SHOWTIME® including exclusive originals, live sports, and news.

trending_videos.title: The White House Correspondents' Dinner
trending_videos.description: John Berman and Laura Coates anchor CNN's live coverage of the 2026 White House Correspondents' Dinner.

trending_videos.title: SportsCenter
trending_videos.description: ESPN's flagship program provides sports news, highlights and analysis.

trending_videos.title: Pittsburgh Penguins at Philadelphia Flyers
trending_videos.description: The Flyers take on the Penguins in Game 4 of the East First Round at Xfinity Mobile Arena. Leading 3-0 after two road wins, the Flyers scored three second-period goals on four shots. Trevor Zegras and Noah Cates each had a goal in the home victory.

trending_videos.title: White House Correspondents' Dinner
trending_videos.description: Coverage of the 2026 White House Correspondents' Dinner anchored by Ayman Mohyeldin, Catherine Rampell and Elise Jordan.

trending_videos.title: Day 3, Rounds 4-7
trending_videos.description: College players are chosen by NFL teams to begin their professional journeys. This year's top picks should include Heisman winner Fernando Mendoza, Rueben Bain Jr., David Bailey and Jeremiyah Love. From Pittsburgh.

videos_without_transcripts.title: Day 3, Rounds 4-7

diverse_genres.insight: The trending videos cover a broad range of genres from entertainment, news, sports, to creative challenges.
diverse_genres.actionable_insight: Creators should explore a mix of content types to appeal to diverse audiences, specifically focusing on high-performing genres like entertainment trailers and news highlights.

news_and_entertainment_dominance.insight: Videos related to news (FOX News, CNN) and entertainment (Prime Video, Paramount Plus) are prominent among the trending content.
news_and_entertainment_dominance.actionable_insight: Channels that combine timely news coverage with entertainment content may capture greater viewer interest.

event-based content.insight: Event-based content such as the White House Correspondents' Dinner appears twice, indicating high viewer engagement.
event-based content.actionable_insight: Leveraging live events and providing unique angles or commentary can drive viewership and engagement.

top_channels.insight: Prime Video, FOX News, and Paramount Plus are among the top channels with trending content.
top_channels.actionable_insight: Emerging creators should study the content strategies of these channels, focusing on quality production and timely releases.

video frequency.insight: Each channel has only one video in the trending list, indicating a wide distribution of trending content across different creators.
video frequency.actionable_insight: Consistency and uniqueness in content can help smaller creators gain visibility alongside established channels.

untapped_categories.insight: The category metadata is unknown, suggesting an opportunity to explore underrepresented categories.
untapped_categories.actionable_insight: Creators can experiment with niche categories that are less saturated to discover new audience segments.

sports content potential.insight: Sports-related content like SportsCenter and specific games (e.g., Pittsburgh Penguins at Philadelphia Flyers) appear in the trending list.
sports content potential.actionable_insight: Sports channels can capitalize on live game coverage and in-depth analyses to attract sports enthusiasts.

creative challenges.insight: Creative challenges such as the '1 Day vs 50,000 Day Build Challenge' show potential for high engagement.
creative challenges.actionable_insight: Developing innovative and interactive content formats can significantly boost viewer interaction and retention.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
